title: Assistant Store Manager - Tupperware India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Tupperware India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Tupperware India are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Bhopal. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Tupperware India:
Tupperware India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tupperware India!
